text.title: Cross Team Interface Change Log Examples
text.summary: One end-to-end worked example showing inputs → procedure → contract-valid report artefact.

inputs.input: 10-line snapshot of last sprint's parent activity events.
Project conventions including version + review cadence.

walkthrough.p: Step 1: preconditions — all 4 bullets in Applies If hold; no Skip If matches.
Step 2: typed inputs assembled with explicit source paths.
Step 3: rationale references each input by name; decision derived per rules r1..r5.
Step 4: owner resolved via CODEOWNERS → alice@example.com. Version stamped 1.0.0. last_reviewed = 2026-05-23.

output.code: { "artefact_id": "cross-team-interface-change-log-2026-05-23-001", "owner": "alice@example.com", "decision": "Adopt option A per rule r1-bound-scope; downstream consumer is the parent-activity reviewer.", "rationale": "Driven by parent-activity-context (last sprint had 3 instances of this gap) and conventions (review cadence weekly). Owner-roster confirms alice owns this area.", "inputs_used": [ {"name": "parent-activity-context", "source": "repo://docs/parent-activity-snapshot.md"}, {"name": "owner-roster", "source": "repo://CODEOWNERS"}, {"name": "conventions", "source": "repo://CONVENTIONS.md"} ], "version": "1.0.0", "last_reviewed": "2026-05-23", "produces": "report" }
